title: Trident Channeling In Any Weather
description: Use trident channeling enchant in any weather
body:
# Any Weather Channeling Plugin  
Use tridents with the `Channeling` enchantment in **any weather condition**!  

While there are mods or datapacks with similar functionality available somewhere in this site, this plugin was created specifically for **Paper/Spigot/Bukkit** servers, allowing you to enjoy the feature without converting your server to Forge or Fabric.  

## Compatibility  
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.x  
- **Server Software**: Paper, Spigot, Bukkit  

## Original Idea  
Inspired by [Any Weather Channeling](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/any-weather-channeling.74526/) on SpigotMC.
